name: Cream Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :45
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8-inch square pan. Mix brown sugar and butter together until well blended. Stir in Bisquick and walnuts until the mixture is crumbly; reserve 1 cup. Press the remaining mixture into the pan with your fingers. Bake for 12 minutes. Mix cream cheese and granulated sugar; beat in the remaining ingredients until smooth. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the layer in the pan; sprinkle with the crumbly mixture. Bake until the center is firm, about 25 minutes.
NB. Results aren't always consistent (sometimes it's too crumbly or the bottom layer sticks in the pan).
